economic_notes: Keeyask Hydro Development project ongoing; Lagoon Project under construction ($3,968,048 assets under construction); War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. operates VLTs; Fox River Camp loan outstanding; Hydro Trust Fund for Manitoba Hydro adverse effects negotiations
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify inventory counts at War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. Consolidated entities include War Lake Administration, War Lake Social Services, War Lake Hydro Trust Funds, and War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages ($988,150) and capital lease obligation ($87,114). Major capital addition of $3,968,048 for Lagoon Project under construction. ISC funding jumped significantly from $2,558,053 (2019) to $7,185,192 (2020) largely due to Jordan's Principle and Lagoon Project funding. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($7,185,192) + CMHC ($65,150) + Solicitor General ($73,765) + Province of Manitoba ($138374) + Manitoba Hydro ($39335) = $7,501,816; osr = Other revenue $3,348,952 less non-government items; annual_debt_service = long-term debt repayment $201,221 + capital lease repayment $21,625 = $222,846.
